posts.title: UK Kent county declares  an ‘illegal immigration emergency’ and refuse all illegals. The measure takes effect on March 19.

twitter.content:
🚨BREAKING: Kent county Council is set to become the first UK county to declare  an ‘illegal immigration emergency’ and refuse all illegals.

The measure is expected to take effect on 19 March.

Other councils are now widely expected to follow.
